name: Nonhighway Use Fuel Tax Relief

eligibility.description: Available to purchasers using fuel for off-road business equipment, stationary engines, or qualified local transit.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides relief from excise taxes for gasoline used for nonhighway purposes, local transit systems, or other exempt purposes via cross-reference to section 6421.
